item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested next manual gate at the start, names the repeated prior pattern of value-keeping/manual check/recheck/confirmation gates, reframes the failures as recurring ownership and system-control problems across reagent, instrument, waste, and sample flows, and moves upstream to unified rules, responsibility, and exception closure under an operations owner. It does not provide the requested refrigerator confirmation-person patch."}
